_model: WB-102 Solderless Breadboard by Circuit Specialists
_notes: All measurements sourced from manufacturer specs and BB830/MB-102 datasheets.
The WB-102 is functionally identical to the industry-standard 830-point breadboard (BB830/MB-102).
Dimensions: 6.5 x 2.125 x 0.3 inches (165.1 x 54.0 x 8.5 mm).
830 total tie-points: 630 terminal + 200 power rail (4 rails x 50 holes each).
Power rails are split into two 25-hole segments per rail with a gap in the middle.
Wire insertion size: 20-29 AWG (0.4 to 0.7mm diameter).
ABS plastic body, white/off-white with color-printed legend.
Phosphor bronze contacts with plated nickel finish.

holes._shape_note: WB-102 holes are slightly square with rounded corners, not perfectly circular

terminal_strip._center_gap_note: 0.3 inches — sized for standard DIP IC packages spanning the gap
terminal_strip._column_labels_note: Column numbers printed every 5 columns: 1, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45, 50, 55, 60, plus 63
terminal_strip._connectivity_note: Each column of 5 holes in the same half (A-E or F-J) is electrically connected

_layout_note: 2 rails on top (positive + negative), 2 rails on bottom (positive + negative).
Each side has 2 rows of holes arranged as 10 groups of 5 columns.
Groups are separated by small gaps; a larger center gap splits them into 2 segments of 5 groups.
50 holes per row, 100 per side, 200 total.
Red (+) stripe on outer edge, blue (-) stripe on inner edge of each rail section.
Stripes are continuous lines beside the hole rows, never on top of them.
power_rails._rail_start_col_note: Rail holes start aligned with this terminal column (1-indexed)
power_rails._offset_note: Distance from the outermost terminal row to the nearest power rail row
power_rails._rail_row_spacing_note: The two rail rows (+ and -) on each side are spaced at standard pitch
power_rails._rail_order_note: On WB-102: red (+) on outside, blue (-) on inside for both top and bottom

rendering._supersample_note: Render at 2x then downscale for cleaner antialiasing
rendering._background_note: Neutral grey background simulating a desk/table surface
